message:
feat(frankenctl): add benchmark bundle types with digest/schema verification error codes

Extends frankenctl with comprehensive benchmark bundle infrastructure:

- Add BenchmarkBundleEnv, BenchmarkBundleManifest, and BenchmarkBundleReproLock
  serializable types that capture host environment, toolchain, runtime policy,
  source revision provenance, and artifact digests for reproducible benchmarking
- Introduce CODE_BUNDLE_DIGEST_MISMATCH (FE-TPV-BUNDLE-0005) and
  CODE_BUNDLE_SCHEMA_MISMATCH (FE-TPV-BUNDLE-0006) error codes for detecting
  tampered or schema-incompatible benchmark artifacts at verification time
- Add sha2 + chrono dependencies for content-addressable digest computation
  and ISO 8601 timestamp capture
- Add bundle field to BenchmarkScoreCommandOutput for round-trip bundle path
- Refactor frankenctl_cli tests: extract write_benchmark_score_input helper,
  update benchmark score/verify round-trip test to exercise bundle generation
  and digest verification with the new types (+212 lines test coverage)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
